prompt:
Create a vertical 2:3 soft cinematic photo collage of a young East Asian schoolgirl in heavy summer rain, assembled as an exact 3-column by 4-row grid of 12 separate candid smartphone-style photos with thin seamless borders. The subject has long wet black hair with bangs stuck to her face, pale skin, natural makeup, expressive eyes, and wears a soaked white short-sleeve school polo shirt with a pale blue collar, a dark blue skirt, and black backpack straps. Use a dreamy Y2K disposable-camera look: misty lens bloom, low contrast, cool blue-gray tones, rain haze, soft focus, motion blur, water droplets on lens, slightly overexposed highlights, nostalgic teenage summer mood, no perfect studio lighting.

Layout and panel count: exactly 12 panels. Row 1: panel 1 is a close selfie of her laughing with mouth open, rain-drenched bangs; panel 2 is a wide selfie with arms spread on a wet road, smiling upward, trees and rain in the background; panel 3 is a close side profile looking up into rain with eyes closed and mouth slightly open. Row 2: panel 4 shows her from behind walking beside a white wall with partial English signage, holding a small object in one hand; panel 5 is an intense wet-hair close-up selfie looking directly into the camera, strands covering one eye; panel 6 is a tilted portrait of her smiling softly while holding a clear umbrella handle or bottle-like object, wet hair falling over her face. Row 3: panel 7 is an extreme close-up with big eyes and a small pout, hair covering the forehead; panel 8 is a high-angle selfie where she smiles brightly with both arms extended toward the camera; panel 9 is a side/back view of her turning her head upward, hair flying, on a rainy tree-lined street. Row 4: panel 10 shows her crouching or leaning forward in the rain while reaching toward the camera, foreground hand blurred; panel 11 is a soft profile looking up at the cloudy sky, torso visible, soaked shirt; panel 12 is a calm centered close selfie with a faint smile and wet bangs.

Add small handwritten white diary-style scribbles on a few panels only, like analog photo notes, including the phrases steal my soul near the lower left of panel 10 and overnight > not alone near panel 9, plus a few tiny illegible cursive marks elsewhere. Keep the text subtle, imperfect, and hand-drawn, not typographic. Backgrounds should be rainy streets, trees, gray pavement, and a white wall, all blurred and atmospheric. The overall feeling is intimate, playful, melancholic, and romantic, like a rainy-day coming-of-age photo diary. Avoid extra people, logos, sharp editorial fashion lighting, clean studio backgrounds, or additional panels.

Create a vertical 2:3 soft cinematic photo collage of a young East Asian schoolgirl in heavy summer rain, assembled as an exact 3-column by 4-row grid of 12 separate candid smartphone-style photos with thin seamless borders. The subject has long wet black hair with bangs stuck to her face, pale skin, natural makeup, expressive eyes, and wears a soaked white short-sleeve school polo shirt with a pale blue collar, a dark blue skirt, and black backpack straps. promptZh:
创建一张 2:3 纵向的柔和电影感照片拼贴，主角是 一位年轻的东亚女学生，背景为夏季大雨，拼贴形式为 3 列 4 行、共 12 格的独立抓拍风格手机照片，带有细小的无缝边框。主体留着湿漉漉的长黑发，刘海贴在脸上，皮肤白皙，自然妆容，眼神生动，身穿 一件湿透的白色短袖校服 Polo 衫，配有浅蓝色领子、深蓝色裙子和黑色书包带。采用梦幻的 Y2K 一次性相机质感：朦胧的镜头光晕、低对比度、冷蓝灰色调、雨雾、柔焦、动态模糊、镜头上的水滴、轻微过曝的高光，营造怀旧的青春夏季氛围，避免使用完美的影棚灯光。

布局与格数：精确 12 格。第 1 行：第 1 格为她张嘴大笑的近景自拍，刘海被雨水打湿；第 2 格为她在湿漉漉的马路上张开双臂的广角自拍，抬头微笑，背景是树木和雨水；第 3 格为她抬头望向雨中的侧脸近景，闭着眼睛，嘴巴微张。第 2 行：第 4 格展示她背对镜头走在白色墙壁旁，墙上有部分英文标识，一只手拿着小物件；第 5 格为她湿发造型的强烈近景自拍，直视镜头，发丝遮住一只眼睛；第 6 格为她拿着透明雨伞手柄或瓶状物时柔和微笑的倾斜肖像，湿发垂在脸上。第 3 行：第 7 格为大眼睛小嘟嘴的极近特写，头发遮住额头；第 8 格为高角度自拍，她双臂向镜头伸展，笑容灿烂；第 9 格为她在雨中林荫道上回头望向天空的侧后方视角，头发飞扬。第 4 行：第 10 格展示她在雨中蹲下或前倾，向镜头伸手，前景手部模糊；第 11 格为她抬头望向阴天的柔和侧脸，可见躯干，衬衫湿透；第 12 格为一张平静的居中近景自拍，带着淡淡的微笑和湿润的刘海。

仅在几张照片上添加细小的白色手写日记风格涂鸦，如同模拟照片笔记，包括在第 10 格左下角附近添加 steal my soul，以及在第 9 格附近添加 overnight > not alone，并在其他地方加上一些细小且难以辨认的草书标记。保持文字的微妙、不完美和手绘感，而非印刷字体。背景应为雨中的街道、树木、灰色路面和白色墙壁，均需模糊处理并富有氛围感。整体感觉亲密、俏皮、忧郁且浪漫，如同雨天的成长照片日记。避免出现额外的人物、标志、锐利的时尚杂志灯光、干净的影棚背景或额外的格数。
